params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of all import containers in the project. Import containers are the primary organizational unit for grouping related import requests. Each project can have up to 1,000 containers.

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

items.docs: Creates a new import container. The container acts as a namespace for related import operations. A maximum of 1,000 containers can be created per project. Optimal performance is maintained under 200,000 import operations per container.

info.name: Get an import container by key

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: importContainerKey
params.description: The user-defined key of the import container.

items.docs: Retrieves an import container by its user-defined key, including its resource type scope and version information.

info.name: Update an import container by key

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: importContainerKey
params.description: The user-defined key of the import container.

items.docs: Replaces the import container identified by the given key with the provided draft. The key itself cannot be changed.

info.name: Delete an import container by key

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: importContainerKey
params.description: The user-defined key of the import container.

items.docs: Permanently deletes the import container with the given key. All associated import operations and their status records are also removed.

info.name: Get import summary for a container

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: importContainerKey
params.description: The user-defined key of the import container.

items.docs: Returns aggregated statistics for all import operations in the given container, grouped by processing state (Accepted, ValidationFailed, Unresolved, WaitForMasterVariant, Imported, Rejected, Cancelled).

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: importContainerKey
params.description: The user-defined key of the import container.

items.docs: Submits a batch of product import requests to the specified container for asynchronous processing. Each request can contain up to 20 product resources. Products are matched by their user-defined key for upsert behavior.

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: importContainerKey
params.description: The user-defined key of the import container.

items.docs: Submits a batch of product variant import requests for asynchronous processing. Variants are matched to products by the product key reference. Each request accepts up to 20 variant resources.

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: importContainerKey
params.description: The user-defined key of the import container.

items.docs: Submits a batch of category import requests for asynchronous processing. Categories are matched by key for upsert behavior. Parent category references are resolved after all categories in the batch are processed.

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: importContainerKey
params.description: The user-defined key of the import container.

items.docs: Submits a batch of customer import requests for asynchronous processing. Customers are matched by key for upsert behavior. Each request accepts up to 20 customer resources.

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: importContainerKey
params.description: The user-defined key of the import container.

items.docs: Submits a batch of order import requests for asynchronous processing. Order imports bypass the normal checkout flow and directly create orders in the system. Each request accepts up to 20 order resources.

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: importContainerKey
params.description: The user-defined key of the import container.

items.docs: Submits a batch of inventory entry import requests for asynchronous processing. Inventory entries are matched by SKU and supply channel for upsert behavior.

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: importContainerKey
params.description: The user-defined key of the import container.

items.docs: Submits a batch of standalone price import requests for asynchronous processing. Standalone prices are matched by key for upsert behavior and are associated with SKUs independently from embedded product variant prices.

info.name: List import operations in a container

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: importContainerKey
params.description: The user-defined key of the import container.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

params.name: state
params.description: Filter operations by their current processing state.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of import operations for the given container. Import operations track the processing status of individual resources within an import request. Supports filtering by state.

info.name: Get an import operation by ID

params.name: projectKey
params.description: The unique key of the commercetools project.

params.name: importContainerKey
params.description: The user-defined key of the import container.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the resource.

items.docs: Retrieves a single import operation by its ID. The operation record includes the processing state, any validation errors, and a reference to the resource that was imported or failed validation.
